title: Check Declarations Executor Schema
description: Type-check DevExtreme declaration files (gulp validate-ts parity)

modulesMetadataFile.description: Path to modules_metadata.json (relative to project root).

tsBundleFile.description: Source bundle .d.ts for jquery check (relative to project root).

bundleArtifactPath.description: Built bundle .d.ts for bundle check (relative to project root).

modulesPattern.description: Glob for module .d.ts files (relative to project root).

entryOutputDir.description: Directory for generated check entry files (relative to project root).

npmPackageDir.description: Npm package folder name under artifacts/npm (e.g. devextreme).

internalPackage.description: Use devextreme-internal package dir for public-modules imports.

typescriptModule.description: TypeScript package to load (e.g. typescript-min), resolved from project root.

compilerOptions.description: Extra compiler options merged into the default check profile.
